product.title: TIRTIR Mask Fit Aura Silver Cushion Foundation | Semi-glow Finish, Natural Coverage, Moisturizing, Lightweight, Korean cushion foundation (#21W Natural Ivory, Full Size, 0.63 Fl Oz)
featureBullets: [SEMI-GLOW PERFECTION] Unlock a radiant, youthful glow with a skin-fit inner glow cushion that delivers a subtle, glass-like finish to enhance your natural beauty. Patented white hyaluronic acid infuses your skin with a rich, luminous glow—perfect for achieving that dewy and healthy complexion you've always desired.

[72-HOUR RADIANT VITALITY] Enjoy long-lasting radiance with the 72-hour Glow Cushion, designed to bring out your inner aura and ensure your skin glows brighter with every touch-up. Say goodbye to cakey makeup, this formula maintains your glow for up to 72 hours.

[DOUBLE GLOW SYSTEM with HIGH-GLOSS FILM FORMER] Experience a unique double glow system that layers multiple moisturizing ingredients to keep your skin hydrated and radiant. Patented White Hyaluronate and Birch Sap deliver deep moisture, while a high-gloss film former locks it in, ensuring a dewy, fresh complexion all day.

[SKIN-TIGHT AND ULTRA LIGHT] Comfort takes precedence with the innovative plant-derived Eco Net Film. This breathable, moisture-retaining shield ensures a flawless base, free from dullness and caking. Imperfections are effortlessly concealed, providing a lightweight, skin-tight finish for your daily makeup routine.

[BEST FOR DRY & COMBINATION SKIN]: Rigorous testing guarantees skin-friendliness and non-irritation, making this cushion ideal for all skin types. Perfect for those with dry or combination skin, it provides a light, moisturizing, and easy-to-use base for a flawless look every day.

specification.value: #5,662 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #63 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides good coverage that's buildable, with a natural finish that changes their appearance. The product receives positive feedback for its quality, with one customer noting it's better than Estée Lauder. The color match and longevity receive mixed reviews - while some find it matches their skin tone perfectly and lasts all day, others report the color being off and the product running out too quickly. The texture and application experience are also mixed, with some finding it soft and easy to apply, while others describe it as cakey and difficult to apply smoothly.

reviews.reviewTitle: I have discovered my perfect makeup!
reviews.reviewText: This is the absolute best foundation I have ever used in my life!!! It feels moisturizing, feels light, does not cake, covers beautifully, does not move even after a long day it still looks perfect which is amazing. Even when I forget to take it off overnight it stays in place! It does not break my skin out. It truly still looks good which is crazy and says it lasts for 48 or 72hrs although I am not even going too see if it is true. It doesn't look dull even after 1 night. The TirTir silver cushion makeup is now my go to for foundation! I do not foresee myself changing to a different foundation since this one makes my face look and feel beautiful! It is easy to use with the cushion. You use very little for full coverage. It matches my color beautifully and I am a very light porcelain, while other brands have made me look dead the TirTir brand makes my skin look alive and bright. It makes my skin feel perfectly moisturized while other brands can have a drying effect, even though I have a wonderful skin care routine and use very moisturizing products on my skin morning and evening plus a mask 3x a week. Bonus my favorite person is the brands spokesman Kim Taehyung or V from BTS! I was surprised to know he uses this brand and loves it enough to endorse it truly tells me it is good since he uses it in his personal life, on stage, and when going to events around the world such as Vogue World
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 3, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Get this one if you are dull, dry, or older. You will love it!
reviews.reviewText: I cannot recommend this product enough especially if you have aging, dry or combination skin, and/or skin that is prone to breakouts. I have all of the above and this makeup is great at coverage, not settling, and this particular Tir Tir product is GLOWY, which has been an issue for me as I get older. My skin has been dull and this product makes me look 10 years younger. The color match for me was amazing. I have light skin with neutral undertones so anything with orange or yellow is bad for me, some pink is ok but this is perfect in the 21N. I have used MANY foundations, both drugstore and high end. I highly recommend this product. You won’t regret it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 24, 2025

reviews.reviewText: It feels really nice on the face, albeit a bit tacky, but some powder fixes that. Super nice, GREAT for pale skin. So many other companies just don’t have shades pale enough. I swatched a few more of the palest shades from some other companies, and this one is the only one that comes close to my skin. I only wish they made it in a bottle like they do the red one.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 13, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Beautiful on skin, way too fragranced
reviews.reviewText: If not for the fragrance, I would have given this a 5 star review. The coverage is STUNNING. My skin looked flawless. I even did half face to compare. Literally no texture, didn't settle in wrinkles, it didn't even look like I had pores! Did a wear time on it and felt it lasted really well. Unfortunately I get migraines from fragrances and can not wear this as it was way too strongly scented for me. But if that does not bother you, try it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 4, 2026

reviews.reviewText: The coverage is amazing and blends into your skin. It not thick and does NOT cake into fine lines on your face. This foundation gives you a glow.... use it with their glow stick for cheeks and lips !
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I really like tirtir foundations so I'm giving 5 stars. However, this didn't give me a semi-glow finish. If anything it seems more matte finish than the red tirtir one I normally use. The color was as expected and the product is easy to apply and blend. I also like that I can barely blot for low coverage or I can really go in hard for full coverage and both look good. I probably won't get the semi-glow again but I'm definitely sticking with tirtir foundation. If you're not sure what color you are, get the sample pack and test them out!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 17, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: I love it at second thought!!
reviews.reviewText: This one shocked me in a good way! I own the Tir Tir red cushion foundation and have a love/less love relationship with it. Sometimes it works great and sometimes I hate the way it looks. The red cushion 15C fair porcelain is the perfect color for me so I opted for the same in the silver cushion. As you can see from the pictures, the silver cushion is far lighter in color. So don’t expect to get the same color foundation between cushions. I applied it and I did have to add a bit more than usual only because this cushion is made to be lighter for aging skin. The color on my skin shocked me. I wasn’t expecting such a light color. Let me explain a tad bit more. I have a makeup process. I do all the prep. I apply pink toned under eye concealer under my eyes. I apply tir tir foundation all over my face but don’t put it on top of the under-eye concealer. I contour my chin and jaw line, my nose, and my cheekbones. I apply blush to my cheekbones. All my products are creams because I’m getting older. I then apply a lighter concealer on my temples, below my cheekbones right above my jawline, either side of my nose right on my face and a line down the middle of my nose. I then blend with a sponge. The lighter concealer helps the contours and blush not to make me look like a clown. Blending 101. With this silver tir tir foundation, I completely skipped under eye concealer and the lighter concealer to blend everything. So I just have the tir tir and contour and blush and blended it all. And it is phenomenal! At first I thought this was gonna make me look like a ghost but when the other two products were added and blended, it’s the exact perfect match for my skin tone. Now, I could not wear it without contour and blush. I would look like a ghost. But the combination is perfect and now I’m able to wear a lot less makeup! It feels nice on my skin. It’s not heavy at all nor does it feel too sticky.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 18, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Very easy to apply. There is no smell. I got a pretty dark color, at the end of the spectrum, and have pretty fair skin, and it looks great. I like to add color to my skin. Great price point. I have the matte one, and this.. and go back and forth with them depending on what sort of look I want. This one plus more sheer and dewy than the other
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: W😍WZA‼️ YES‼️I'm HOOKED‼️ The BEST Brand I've EVER purchased in ANY Foundation Colour...PERFECT for a NATURAL LOOK & IMPORTANTLY THE FEEL....like a🪶coverage!☺️. reviews.reviewText: It's not bad for dry skin only but Cakey on mine didn't suit it..It is very dewy.
Got the mini size to try it out. Nothing came out from the product. It had dried out completely and it was empty! 😔
